_notes.setup: Copy this file to config.json before running the bot.
_notes.important: Most anime-related fields can be changed later using Discord slash commands like /setanime, /settitle, /syncanime, and /setnext.
_notes.firstEpisodeAt: Required for local countdown calculation. Use ISO format with timezone offset, for example: 2026-07-10T00:30:00+00:00.
_notes.updateIntervalMinutes: How often the bot updates the Discord widget countdown. Recommended: 10 or 15. Do not set below 5.
_notes.postReleaseAniListSyncDelayMinutes: How long to wait after an episode airs before syncing AniList again. Recommended: 30-60.
_notes.manualOverrides: Optional. Use for delayed/skipped episodes or corrected airing dates. Can also be changed through bot commands.
